hero.headline:
Engineering Scalable
Digital Experiences
hero.sub: I specialize in architecting high-performance web applications that combine technical excellence with intuitive design. Proven track record in optimizing enterprise-scale systems.
hero.name: Asad Ali Janjua

about.text: With over 5 years of industry experience, I have led the development of critical software solutions for startups and established enterprises. My approach centers on performance, accessibility, and maintainable architecture.

0.description: Architected a multi-tenant enterprise SaaS platform, improving system throughput by 45% and reducing infrastructure costs by 20%. Led a team of 5 developers to deliver pixel-perfect React interfaces.

1.description: Developed high-performance microservices handling 1M+ daily requests. Integrated real-time analytics dashboards and optimized database queries, resulting in 30% faster API response times.

2.description: Collaborated with design teams to transform high-fidelity Figma mockups into responsive, accessible web experiences. Implemented SEO best practices that increased organic traffic by 25%.

projects.title: Enterprise E-Commerce Engine
projects.description: A high-conversion e-commerce platform featuring a custom headless CMS, stripe integration, and real-time inventory management. Improved conversion rates by 12% post-launch.

projects.title: Crypto Portfolio Tracker
projects.description: Financial dashboard providing real-time market data via WebSocket, portfolio PnL analysis, and automated tax reporting. Used by 5k+ active monthly users.

projects.title: Collaborative Workspace
projects.description: Real-time task management tool with live cursors, drag-and-drop workflow automation, and deep Jira integration. Built for high-velocity engineering teams.

testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.content: Asad's ability to translate complex business requirements into elegant technical solutions is unmatched. He delivered our MVP 2 weeks ahead of schedule with 99.9% uptime.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: One of the most detail-oriented engineers I've worked with. His focus on performance optimization helped us scale our user base by 3x without increasing server costs.

testimonials.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.content: The attention to UX and motion design Asad brings to the table is rare for a full-stack developer. He doesn't just build features; he builds experiences.
